message:
refactor(logic_table): use existing codegen infrastructure

Remove all custom expression handling (genBatchExpr, extractDependencies).
The @logic_table decorator now just:
1. Wraps output in struct with __logic_table__ = true
2. Calls existing genFunctionDef() for each method
3. Adds methods array

All Python syntax is handled by metal0's existing codegen - no special cases.
